description:
The LegacyAudioPlayer component is a leftover Component from content migrated from other platforms. It should not be used, and should be replaced whenever possible.

For a replacement see Audio Player.

fields.AudioClip: The audio clip for this audio player.
fields._clipPlayer: The audio clip player that will play the audio clip.
fields._audioOutput: The audio output for the audio clip.
fields._waveformMaterial: The material that is used on the ring visual.
fields._playbackMaterial: The material that is used for the playback visual.
fields._waveformRingMesh: The mesh used for the waveform ring visual.
fields._playbackRingMesh: The mesh used for the playback ring visual.
fields._playbackRingArc: The field to drive to make the visual for the playback ring.
fields._volumeRingArc: The field to drive to make the visual for the audio arc.
fields._playbackTimeText: The field to drive for the playback time text.
fields._clipLengthTimeText: The field to drive for the audio clip length text.
fields._iconTextureURL: The field to drive with the icon texture URI.
fields._stopItem: The item that can be clicked to stop playback.
fields._loopItem: The item that can be clicked to loop playback.
fields._spatialItem: The item that can be clicked to spatialize or unspatialize the audio.
fields._loopIconURL: The field to drive with the loop icon texture URI.
fields._spatialIconURL: The field to drive with the spatialize icon URI.
fields._exportable: The audio exportable component used to handle the export behavior of this audio player.
fields._assetProxy: The asset proxy used to handle dropping this audio player into fields that accept audio clips.

methods.StopPressed: A sync delegate to call when the stop button is pressed.
methods.LoopToggle: A sync delegate to call when the loop button is pressed.
methods.SpatialToggle: A sync delegate to call when the spatialize button is pressed.
